title: Trading from New York to Alaska is completed
author: Outrageous-Hat9277
selftext:
Our challenge from NYC to Alaska has been successfully completed 🔥

In just 13 days, we drove over 8,000 km. There were quite a few challenges, but we overcame them.

In total, we made +70%. All our trades were publicly posted in real time.

Once again, we’ve proven that you can trade from anywhere, as long as you know how to do it 😁

If you want to learn, join our free trading school. Access in bio.
